OIL AND NATURAL GAS CORPORATION LIMITED

I have learnt a lot of technical things here. Particularly, I have learnt about drilling. What is cementing, and how it is done. The work environment here is very friendly, the seniors are very supportive. I would like to thank the Government of India and ONGC for this opportunity

I was selected at ONGC, Jorhat. It has been about 3 months now. My mentors are very good here. They teach me in a basic way. I have learnt to work on software’s like MS office.My confidence level, communication skills, grooming, have improved. I would like to thank the ONGC and the Government of India for providing this opportunity.

I am learning about various industrial softwares and about satellite waves and hydrocarbon exploration. Along with the technical skills, I am also engaged in workshops and presentations, where I get to interact with the professionals. Recently, I have attended a presentation on green hydrogen, which was great. Professionals there guided me personally and taught me about the concept. It is a great experience here.

I have been selected as an intern through PM Internship Scheme in ONGC, Jorhatt. After being selected as an intern, we have been given a lot of training from the company, like health safety, fire safety and cyber-crime. After that, I have been posted as an intern in Regional Geoscience Lab. I have learned technical skills like oil parameters, pore point, density, water content and many more. I would like to thank ONGC and the government for this opportunity.

I have learnt how to interact with people, how to handle situations, how to handle calls, and how grooming changes your personality. Those who want to come to this internship program, I would urge you to apply for the internship program on portal, you can apply and then you will get the opportunity to work and learn.

I was given a task that I had never done before, and that was to speak on call with our stakeholders. I completed the task and received appreciation for it from my supervisor. I felt that I could do more.
Everyone is very nice to me. The manager is very polite. I have learnt a lot of skills, they taught me about a lot of things like computer, registering arrival and departure data.

This opportunity has provided me with valuable hands-on experience and helped me enhance my skills in the corporate world. The mentorship and guidance I have received here have been incredibly insightful and beneficial for my professional growth. I would like to take a moment to express my gratitude to the Prime Minister and the Government of India for offering such a wonderful opportunity.
HONEYWELL TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS LAB PRIVATE LIMITED

Register, complete your profile, explore and apply for paid internships in top companies of India seamlessly with the PM internship mobile application.

The Prime Minister's Internship Scheme (PMIS) is part of the Prime Minister's package of five schemes and initiatives designed to facilitate employment, skilling, and other opportunities for India's youth. PMIS is aimed at youth currently not in full time employment, providing them with paid internship opportunities in leading companies across India. The objective of this scheme is to enhance the employability of Indian youth. The pilot phase of the scheme is currently underway.
